html:
E

Ascents of the Matterhorn

No. of Ascent. Date. Names. Route taken. Remarks.
1865.
1 July 13⁠–⁠15 Lord Francis Douglas.
D. Hadow.
Charles Hudson.
Edward Whymper.		 Zermatt
(or Northern route).		 Guides⁠—Michel Croz, Peter Taugwalder père, Peter Taugwalder fils. See Chapters XXI and XXII.
2 July 16⁠–⁠18 Jean-Antoine Carrel.
J. Baptiste Bich.
Amé Gorret.
J.-Augustin Meynet.		 Breuil
(or Southern route).		 The first two named only ascended to the summit. See Appendix C.
1867.
3 Aug. 13⁠–⁠15 F. Craufurd Grove. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel, Salomon Meynet, and J. B. Bich.
4 Sept. 12⁠–⁠14 Jos. Maquignaz.
J.-Pierre Maquignaz.
Victor Maquignaz.
Caesar Carrel.
J.-B. Carrel.		 Breuil. An easier route was discovered by this party than that taken upon July 17, 1865. The first two named only ascended to the summit. See Appendix C.
5 Oct. 1⁠–⁠3 W. Leighton Jordan. Breuil. Guides⁠—the Maquignaz’s just named, Caesar Carrel, and F. Ansermin. The Maquignaz’s and Mr. Jordan alone reached the summit.
1868.
6 July 24⁠–⁠25 J. M. Elliott. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jos. Marie Lochmatter and Peter Knubel.
7 July 26⁠–⁠28 J. Tyndall. Up Breuil side and down Zermatt side. Guides⁠—J.-Jos., J.-Pierre Maquignaz, and three others.
8 Aug. 2⁠–⁠4 O. Hoiler.
F. Thioly.		 Up Zermatt side and down Breuil side. Account given in hotel-book at Breuil is not very clear. Guides seem to have been J.-Jos. and Victor Maquignaz and Elie Pession.
9 Aug. 3⁠–⁠4 G. E. Foster. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Hans Baumann, Peter Bernett, and Peter Knubel.
10 Aug. 8430 Paul Guessfeldt. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jos. Marie Lochmatter, Nich. Knubel, and Peter Knubel.
11 Sept. 1⁠–⁠2 A. G. Girdlestone.
F. Craufurd Grove.
W. E. U. Kelso.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jos. Marie Lochmatter, Nich. Knubel, and the two Knubels.
12 Sept. 2⁠–⁠3 G. B. Marke. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Nich. Knubel and Pierre Zurbriggen (Saas).
13 Sept. 3⁠–⁠5 F. Giordano. Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and Jos. Maquignaz. See Appendix C.
14 Sept. 8⁠–⁠9 Paul Sauzet. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and Jos. Maquignaz.
1869.
15 July 20 James Eccles. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel, Bich, and two Payots (Chamounix).
16 Aug. 26⁠–⁠27 R. B. Heathcote. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-Jos., J.-Pierre, Victor, and Emmanuel Maquignaz.
1870.
17 July 22⁠–⁠23 E. Javelle. Zermatt. Guide⁠—Nich. Knubel.
1871.
18 July 16⁠–⁠17 E. R. Whitwell. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Ulrich and Christian Lauener.
19 July 21⁠–⁠22 F. Gardiner.
F. Walker.
Lucy Walker.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Peter Perrn, P. Knubel, N. Knubel, Melchior Anderegg, and Heinrich Anderegg.
20 ? ⸻ Fowler. Zermatt. Guides⁠—C. Knubel and J. M. Lochmatter.
21 Aug. 2⁠–⁠3 W. E. Utterson-Kelso.
A. G. Girdlestone.		 Breuil. Guides⁠—Victor and Emmanuel Maquignaz and Joseph Gillioz.
22 Aug. 7⁠–⁠8 R. S. Lyle. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-J. Maquignaz, Victor Maquignaz and Joseph Gillioz.
23 Aug. 18⁠–⁠19 C. E. Mathews.
F. Morshead.		 Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and Melchior Anderegg, with two porters.
24 Aug. 28⁠–⁠29 C. T. Dent. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Franz and Alex. Burgener.
25 Sept. 4⁠–⁠5 M. C. Brevoort.
W. A. B. Coolidge.		 Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—Christian Almer, Ulrich Almer, and N. Knubel.
26 Sept. 5? Lord Wentworth. Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-J. and J.-Pierre Maquignaz.
27 Sept. 7⁠–⁠8 R. Fowler. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. Lochmatter and P. Knubel.
1872.
28 July 21 H. Bicknell. ? Guides⁠—Not known.
29 July 22⁠–⁠23 F. Gardiner.
T. Middlemore.		 Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-J. Maquignaz, Peter Knubel, and Johann Jaun.
30 July 24⁠–⁠25 R. Pendlebury.
W. M. Pendlebury.
C. Taylor.		 Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—Peter Taugwalder fils, Gabriel Spechtenhauser, and F. Imseng.
31 July 26? J. Jackson. Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-Jos. Maquignaz and Anton Ritz.
32 July 26⁠–⁠27 F. A. Wallroth. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Nicholas and P. Knubel.
33 Aug. 29⁠–⁠30 A. Rothschild. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Franz Biener and two Knubels.
34 Sept. 1⁠–⁠2 G. A. Passingham. Zermatt. Guides⁠—F. Imseng and Franz Andermatten.
35 Sept. 9⁠–⁠10 H. Denning.
E. Hutchins.
J. Young.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Melchior Schlapp, Peter Rubi, and two Knubels.
36 Sept. 10⁠–⁠11 L. Saunderson. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Peter Bohren and Peter Knubel.
37 Sept. 11⁠–⁠12 E. Millidge. Zermatt. Guide⁠—⸻ Pollinger.
38 Sept. 11⁠–⁠12 D. J. Abercromby. Zermatt. Guides⁠—N. Knubel and P. J. Knubel.
39 Sept. 16⁠–⁠17 C. Bronzet. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Knubel, F. Truffer, and J. Truffer.
1873.
40 July 6⁠–⁠7 T. Cox.
J. Gardiner.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Peter Knubel and J. M. Lochmatter.
41 July 6⁠–⁠7 C. Théraulaz. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. Gillot and Ignace Sarbach.
42 July 21⁠–⁠22 A. F. Leach. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Taugwalder fils and J. M. Kronig.
43 July 21⁠–⁠22 T. A. Bishop. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Knubel, P. J. Knubel, and F. Dévouassoud.

45 July 23⁠–⁠24 H. Salmond. Breuil. Guides⁠—J. B. Bich and two others.
46 July 25⁠–⁠26 E. Leatham. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Knubel and Joseph Imboden.
47 July 25⁠–⁠27 W. W. Simpson. Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel, J.-P. Maquignaz, and a Chamounix guide.
48 July 29⁠–⁠30 M. Déchy. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and P. Taugwalder fils.
49 Aug. 3 J. Bischoff.
E. Burckhardt.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—No information.
50 Aug. 6⁠–⁠7 Emile Veyrin. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. J. Knubel; porter, Joh. Knubel.
51 Aug. 8? A. Pession.
L. Albin.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-J. and J.-Pierre Maquignaz.
52 Aug. 9⁠–⁠10 L. Ewbank. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. and Alex. Lochmatter.
53 Aug. 11 G. E. Hulton.
F. C. Hulton.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Ch. Lauener, Johann Fischer, and Peter Rubi.
54 Aug. 11⁠–⁠12 Marquis Maglioni. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Knubel, Edouard Capelin; porter H. Knubel.
55 Aug. 14⁠–⁠15 F. Dawkins. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Franz Andermatten, A. Burgener; porter, Abraham Imseng.
56 Aug. 15⁠–⁠16 J. F. Bramston.
F. Morshead.
C. H. Hawkins.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Melchior Anderegg, B. Nageli, and J. M. Lochmatter.
57 Aug. 16 H. S. Hoare. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Johann von Bergen and A. Pollinger.
58 Aug. 18⁠–⁠22 E. Pigeon.
A. Pigeon.		 Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel, V. Maquignaz, and J. Martin. This party was confined in the hut on the Italian side from the 18th to the 21st of August, by bad weather; and in descending upon the Zermatt side it was surprised by night before the cabane could be reached, and had to pass the night on the open mountainside.
59 Aug. 22⁠–⁠23 F. P. Barlow. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jakob Anderegg and P. Taugwalder fils.
60 Oct. 2⁠–⁠3 W. W. Stuart. Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jos. Maquignaz, F. Bich, and Jos. Balmat.
1874.
61 July 13⁠–⁠14 J. Brebner.
M. Cannon.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—F. Burgener and J. Sarbach.
62 July 14⁠–⁠15 T. G. Bonney. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. Lochmatter and J. Petrus.
63 July 17⁠–⁠18 F. Wolf. Zermatt. Guides⁠—A. Pollinger and Jos. Lauber.
64 July 18⁠–⁠19 A. Millot and wife. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Melchior Anderegg, A. Maurer, and P. Taugwalder fils.
65 July? H. Lamb. ? Guides⁠—Not known.
66 July 19⁠–⁠20 J. Baumann. Zermatt. Guide-Ulrich Lauener.
67 July 23⁠–⁠24 E. Javelle.
Th. Bornand.		 Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—Gillioz, père et fils.
68 July 27⁠–⁠29 L. K. Rankine. Zermatt. Guides⁠—A. Pollinger and Jos. Längen.
69 Aug. 7⁠–⁠8 G. F. Cobb.
S. Forster.
A. M. Tod.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Taugwalder fils, Jos. Taugwalder, and A. Summermatter.
70 Aug. 7 J. Birkbeck, Jun. Breuil to Breuil. Guides⁠—J. Petrus and J. B. Bich. Mr. Birkbeck and his guides started from Breuil, crossed the mountain to the northern side, and returned to Breuil, in 19 hours.
71 Aug. 7⁠–⁠8 M. Bramston. Zermatt. Guide⁠—B. Nageli.
72 Aug. 12 G. Dévin. Zermatt. Guides⁠—L. Pollinger and Henri Séraphin.

75 Aug. 20⁠–⁠21 R. Lindt. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Ig. Sarbach and Peter Sulzer.
76 Aug. 20⁠–⁠22 Edward Whymper. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel, J. B. Bich, and J. M. Lochmatter. An ascent made for the sake of photography. Passed two nights in the Zermatt cabane.
77 Aug. 21⁠–⁠22 Robert Fowler. Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—Louis Carrel and Victor Maquignaz; porter, Augustin Ansermin.
78 Aug. 21⁠–⁠22 Prof. G. Bolle.?
Prof. K⁠⸺.		 Breuil. Guides⁠—P. Maquignaz, E. Pession, and Chas. Gorret. Account is illegible.
79 Aug. 22⁠–⁠23 W. E. Davidson. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Laurent Lanier and Ig. Sarbach.
80 Aug. 25 F. W. Headley.
E. P. Arnold.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—A. Pollinger and J. J. Truffer.

86 Aug. 28 J. H. Pratt.
G. W. Prothero.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and P. Knubel. Ascent made in one day.

88 Sept. 2 E. Dent.

89 Sept. 2 J. W. Borel. Zermatt. Guides⁠—A. Pollinger and J. J. Truffer.
90 Sept. 1⁠–⁠2 W. A. Lewis. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. Lochmatter and P. Imboden.

From Zermatt, and back in a day; 11¾ hs. walking, and 5¾ hs. halts (3¼ hs. from forced inaction due to other parties.)
145 Aug. 10⁠–⁠11 W. B. Wildman. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Knubel; porter, J. Sarbach.
146 Aug. 10⁠–⁠11 Felix O. Schuster. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Peter Baumann and P. J. Truffer.
147 Aug. 13⁠–⁠14 Q. Sella.
A. Sella.
Corradino Sella.
Carlo Sella.
L. dell’Oro.

155 Aug. 27? Alfred O’Gorman. Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—A. Imboden and another. This party left Zermatt at midnight, crossed to the Breuil side, and returned to Zermatt over the Breuiljoch within twenty-four hours.
156 Aug. 28? E. Dorn.? Breuil. Guides⁠—J.-J., Victor, and Emmanuel Maquignaz.
157 Aug. 28 A. Barran. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. Sarbach and J. Längen.
158 Aug. 27⁠–⁠28 C. P. Howard. Zermatt. Guides⁠—V. Furrer and Joseph Brantschen.

160 Aug. 30 J. D. Griffiths. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Basile Andenmatten and?

162 Aug. 30 J. F. Yearsley. Zermatt. Guides⁠—F. Burgener, P. Andenmatten; porter, ⸻ Blumenthal.
163 Aug. 30⁠–⁠31 J. C. Leman.

1878.
169 ? T. Jose. Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. Lochmatter, P. Knubel, and Pierre Truffer.

174 Jul. 28⁠–⁠29 Rob von Lendenfeld.

175 Aug. 11⁠–⁠12 R. G. Allan.
B. Allan.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Joseph Moser and J. Kohler.

Prof. H. Schiess.		 Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J. M. Lochmatter, Jos. Brantschen, and P. Beytrison (Évolène). Brantschen was left behind in the hut on the “cravate,” and died there. See Appendix C.

A. Sloman.		 Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-A. Carrel and A. Supersax.

181 Aug. 13⁠–⁠14 A. E. Craven.

182 Aug. 13⁠–⁠14 H. D. Gardner. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Joseph and Gabriel Taugwalder.
183 Aug. 15 P. Cornaglia.? Breuil to Zermatt. Guides⁠—J.-Pierre and Victor Maquignaz.
184 Aug. 21⁠–⁠22 R. Levy.
A. Jerusalem.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Not known.
185 Aug. 22 C. Wilson.
F. E. Wilson.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—A. Burgener and Jos. Furrer.
186 Aug. 24⁠–⁠25 J. E. Bode. Zermatt. Guide⁠—J. Petrus and a Porter.
187 Aug. 28⁠–⁠29 C. E. B. Watson. Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—P. Anderegg and A. Imboden.
188 Aug. 30 H. Latham, Jr.
G. E. Maude.
E. L. Vaughan.
H. G. Willink.		 Zermatt. Guides⁠—Carl Hess, Johann Anderegg, and a porter.
189 Aug. 30-Sept. 1 W. G. Hutchinson. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Franz Biener; porter, P. Taugwalder.
190 Aug. 30-Sept. 1 G. H. Savage. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Jos. Imboden and Franz Andermatten. Dr. Savage slept on the Hörnli, Aug. 30; began the ascent by moonlight at a little before 2 a.m. on September 1, reached the summit at 6:30 a.m., and returned to Zermatt by 12:30 p.m.
191 Sept. 2⁠–⁠3 A. F. Mummery. Z’Mutt side. Alexander Burgener, J. Petrus, and A. Kentinetta. Mr. Mummery was the first to ascend the Matterhorn from the side of the Z’Mutt Glacier. See Appendix C.
192 Sept. 2⁠–⁠3 W. Penhall. Z’Mutt side. Guides⁠—Ferdinand Imseng and Louis Zurbrücken. Mr. Penhall took a route slightly farther to the south than that followed by Mr. Mummery. See Appendix C.
193 Sept. 2⁠–⁠3 W. H. Grenfell. Zermatt. Guides⁠—Michel C. Payot, and a porter.
194 Sept. 4⁠–⁠5 B. Wainewright. Zermatt to Breuil. Guides⁠—Jos. Imboden and Peter Sarbach.
195 Sept. 4⁠–⁠5 H. Hoare. Zermatt. Guide⁠—J. Anderegg; porter, Jos. Chanton.
196 Sept. 5⁠–⁠6 J. Baumann. Z’Mutt side. Guides⁠—J. Petrus and Emile Rey.
1880.
197 Jul. 19 H. Backhouse. Zermatt. Guides⁠—P. Taugwalder and A. Pollinger.

Note.⁠—A few other ascents are known to have been made before 1880, about which it has not been found possible to obtain information.
